E

ElementInputManager - Class in Manager
class used to get movie and person objects from user

execute() - Method in class Commands.AddCommand
adds new movie to collection

adds new movie to colection if it's usaBoxOffice if max

adds new movie to collection if it's usaBoxOffice is min
execute() - Method in class Commands.ClearCommand
clears collection

used to count movies that have lower screenwriter than given
